entities.name: GENDER INEQUALITIES
entities.description: Disparities between genders in access to resources and opportunities that affect climate service outcomes

entities.name: WOMEN'S EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the capacity of women to make strategic life choices and access resources

entities.name: CLIMATE SERVICES
entities.description: Services that use climate data to help people make informed decisions for resilience and productivity

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a system or community to absorb climate-related disturbances while maintaining function

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production in agricultural or economic contexts

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: Reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life

entities.name: GENDER-RESPONSIVE EVALUATION
entities.description: Evaluation processes that specifically account for and address gender differences and inequalities

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa used as a case study for rural climate services

entities.name: RWANDA
entities.description: A country in East Africa used as a case study for rural climate services

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region used as a case study for rural climate services

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION NEEDS
entities.description: Specific requirements for weather and climate data to make informed decisions

entities.name: ACCESS TO INFORMATION
entities.description: The ability of individuals to obtain necessary climate data and support

entities.name: GROUP PARTICIPATORY PROCESSES
entities.description: Collaborative methods involving community groups to identify needs and demand for information

entities.name: WEATHER AND CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data regarding atmospheric conditions used for planning and decision making

entities.name: GENDER EQUITY
entities.description: Fairness of treatment for women and men according to their respective needs

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE METHODS
entities.description: Research methods based on numerical data and statistical analysis to identify changes in demand

entities.name: QUALITATIVE APPROACHES
entities.description: Research methods based on non-numerical data to assess nuances of communication processes

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY COMMUNICATION PROCESSES
entities.description: Communication methods that involve active participation of stakeholders

entities.name: CLIMATE-SENSITIVE DECISIONS
entities.description: Decisions that are significantly influenced by weather and climate patterns

entities.name: LOCAL NORMATIVE AND INSTITUTIONAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The social norms and formal rules that influence empowerment and access

entities.name: MIXED METHOD METHODOLOGIES
entities.description: Research approaches combining both quantitative and qualitative data for comprehensive assessment
